positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u28,axiom,
    rating_gt4(hamden_plaza_subway)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~take_out(x_restaurant)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~popular_local(X0) | rating_gt4(X0)).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    take_out(hamden_plaza_subway)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    x_restaurant != hamden_plaza_subway).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define yelp_recommended(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define not_many_negative_reviews(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define many_negative_reviews(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
